errors.message: Streamable HTTP error: Error POSTing to endpoint: {"error":"AUTH","retriable":false,"message":"未提供 API Key —— 请求未携带凭据，重试无用。Missing API key. The request carried no credentials; retrying will not help.","hint":"请在 MCP 配置里加上 API Key(URL 加 ?api_key=pgl_xxx,或 HTTP 头 Authorization: Bearer pgl_xxx),然后重启/重新连接本 MCP 服务使其生效 —— 配置不会热加载。没有 Key 请到 https://www.pangolinfo.com 登录获取。 / Add the key in your MCP config (?api_key=pgl_xxx in the URL, or an Authorization: Bearer pgl_xxx header), then restart/reconnect this MCP server for it to take effect — config is not hot-reloaded. Get a key at https://www.pangolinfo.com."}
